subcodes.first_line: The servant beareth witness to the oneness of God and His singleness, to His justice and His bounty, and to the Last Day, the Day of Rising [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد الخادم بوحدانیه الله و فردانیته و بعدله و عطائه و بالیوم الاخر یوم یقوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @praise and encouragement, @justice and wrath of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @consultation
